n: AI in Healthcare — Transforming Patient Outcomes

S.n: AI is Rewriting the Rules of Patient Care
Today's Healthcare System Is Failing Patients at Scale

B.x: Three Critical Gaps Putting Lives at Risk

I.title: Misdiagnosis Rates
I.x: ~40% of serious conditions are misdiagnosed or delayed, leading to avoidable harm

I.title: Unbearable Wait Times
I.x: Patients wait 18–24 days on average for specialist appointments in developed nations

I.title: Fragmented Data Silos
I.x: 80% of patient data is unstructured and trapped across disconnected systems

B.x: The status quo costs the US healthcare system over $750B annually in waste, errors, and inefficiencies.
B.title: The Cost of Inaction

S.n: Our AI Pipeline Turns Raw Data Into Life-Saving Decisions

B.x: Unified pipeline connecting EHRs, imaging, labs, and wearables into a single intelligent decision engine.

I: Ingests structured + unstructured clinical data in real time
Applies multimodal AI models trained on 50M+ patient records
Surfaces ranked differential diagnoses with confidence scores
Triggers automated care-pathway recommendations for clinicians

S.n: Measurable Outcomes Clinicians and CFOs Both Trust

blocks.x: Validated across 14 clinical specialties in peer-reviewed trials
Median time-to-diagnosis reduced from 6.2 days to 3.7 days
Average annual cost avoidance per 500-bed facility deployment
